description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the pksadiq/emacs:alpine-amd64 Docker image. Define a single job called pages (running in the default stage) that executes the shell commands: `emacs --batch -l /root/.config/emacs/init.el -l src/my-web.el -f org-publish-all`, `./src/blog-atom.sh`, and `find public -type f -regex '.*\\.(html|txt|xml|css)$' -exec gzip -f -k {} \\;`. The job should collect the public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. Configure the job to run only on the master branch.
